thumbnail_specs.text_overlay_guidelines: Text must be legible at small sizes (search results, mobile). Avoid more than 5-6 words. Title text must be factually accurate — exaggerated or false claims in thumbnails violate YouTube policies and creator standards.

hook_requirements.hook_style_notes: The first 30 seconds must establish the central question or mystery and give the viewer a clear reason to continue. The hook does not need to be fast — it needs to be compelling. For documentary content, compelling often means surprising, counterintuitive, or deeply curious.

algorithm_considerations.upload_frequency_signals: consistent upload schedule is rewarded; irregular uploads reduce channel velocity

pacing_override.notes: YouTube Long Form does not impose pacing constraints beyond the hook window. Genre Template and Creator Profile pacing rules apply. Avoid mid-video silence longer than 60 seconds — not for algorithmic reasons but because long-form viewer attention requires periodic re-engagement even in reflective content.
